parameters.query:
SELECT
  pr.id AS proceso_id,
  pr.title,
  pr.type,
  pr.description,
  pr.next_step,
  pr.approximate_time,
  pr.expenses,
  pr.created_at,
  pr.updated_at,
  p.id   AS property_id,
  p.code AS property_code,
  p.address AS property_address,
  p.status AS property_status
FROM properties p
JOIN processes pr ON pr.property_id = p.id
WHERE p.is_active = true
  AND (
    p.code ILIKE $1
    OR p.address ILIKE ('%' || $1 || '%')
  )
ORDER BY p.code, pr.created_at DESC;
